title: Bitfarms June 2024 Production and Operations Update
text: Bitfarms earned 189 BTC in June 2024 with installed hashrate increased to 11.4 EH/s with 10.4 EH/s operational. Energy efficiency improved to 25 w/TH, up 36% year-over-year and 7.4% month-over-month. Company entered into new agreement to develop 120 MW site in Sharon, Pennsylvania, situated strategically within Pennsylvania-New Jersey-Maryland Interconnection (PJM), largest wholesale electricity market in U.S. 2025 power capacity target more than doubles to 648 MW from current 310 MW. In Paraguay, Paso Pe facility was energized with 4 of 5 warehouses and 6 of 8 hydro containers fully operational, contributing 2.5 EH/s with remaining 0.6 EH/s to be energized in July.
